name: Musubi Memory
description: Connect OpenClaw agents to a Musubi memory core. Episodic capture mirroring, curated + concept recall via memory supplements, and presence-to-presence thought delivery over SSE.
author: Eric Mey

core.baseUrl.label: Musubi Core URL
core.baseUrl.help: Base URL of your Musubi core service. Plugin talks to this over HTTPS.

core.token.label: Bearer Token
core.token.help: Bearer token issued by Musubi. Scope must include the presence(s) this plugin represents.

presence.defaultId.label: Default Presence
presence.defaultId.help: Presence identifier used when no per-agent presence mapping is provided. Shape: <owner>/<presence>.

presence.perAgent.label: Per-Agent Presence Map
presence.perAgent.help: Map OpenClaw agent ids to Musubi presences. Shape: {"aoi": "eric/aoi", "rin": "eric/rin"}.

supplement.enabled.label: Prompt + Corpus Supplement
supplement.enabled.help: When enabled, Musubi curated + concept results are blended into memory prompt assembly with authority labels.

supplement.planes.label: Supplement Planes
supplement.planes.help: Which Musubi planes contribute to the memory supplement. Default: curated, concept.

supplement.maxResults.label: Supplement Result Cap
supplement.maxResults.help: Max results injected per memory turn. Keep small — prompt budget is limited.

capture.mirrorOpenClawMemory.label: Mirror OpenClaw Memory Writes
capture.mirrorOpenClawMemory.help: Hook OpenClaw's native memory write events and mirror them into Musubi episodic. Gives cross-modality continuity without replacing the native memory engine.

thoughts.enabled.label: Thought Delivery
thoughts.enabled.help: Subscribe to the Musubi thoughts SSE stream for this presence. Surfaces inbound thoughts from other presences (Claude Code, LiveKit, etc.).

thoughts.reconnect.maxBackoffMs.label: Thought Reconnect Max Backoff
thoughts.reconnect.maxBackoffMs.help: Maximum exponential backoff between SSE reconnect attempts.
